title: Assessment of Oxidative Phosphorylation and Glycolysis in NK Cells
author: Philippa R Kennedy

steps.title: NK cells are resuspended in Seahorse...
steps.instruction: NK cells are resuspended in Seahorse XF Assay Medium and added to a 96 well or 24 well flat bottom plate that has been coated with 0.01% poly-L-Lysine solution (Millipore Sigma) according to the manufacturer's instructions.

steps.title: The extracellular acidification rate (ECAR) and...
steps.instruction: The extracellular acidification rate (ECAR) and the oxygen consumption rate (OCR) are measured (pmoles/min) in real time in an XFe96 analyzer after injection of drugs in the specified order. e.g. Mito Stress Test kit (10 mM glucose, 1 μM oligomycin then 1 μM FCCP plus 1mM sodium pyruvate then 0.5 μM rotenone/antimycin A; Cat. No. 103015-100) Glycolytic rate assay kit (0.5μM rotenone/antimycin A then 50mM 2-DG; Cat. No. 103344-100) ATP Rate Assay kit (1μM oligomycin then 0.5μM rotenone/antimycin A; Cat. No. 103592-100; all Agilent Technologies)

steps.title: The spare respiratory capacity (SRC) is...
steps.instruction: The spare respiratory capacity (SRC) is calculated from the change from basal oxygen consumption, after addition of glucose, to maximal oxygen consumption, after addition of FCCP.

steps.title: Day before assay
steps.instruction: Day before assay: Hydrate seahorse sensor cartridge Add 200 μL of sterile water to each well of the Seahorse utility plate.

steps.title: Day of assay
steps.instruction: Day of assay: Replace water in utility plate with 200 μL Seahorse calibrant per well and place back into the non-CO 2 incubator

steps.title: Wash NK cells twice, once with...
steps.instruction: Wash NK cells twice, once with PBS and once with Seahorse XF Assay medium (Agilent Technologies)

steps.title: Spin down cells to adhere to the plate
steps.instruction: Spin down cells to adhere to the plate. Spin plate at 40 g (500 RPM) for 4 minutes. Rotate plate 180° and then spin cells at 80 g (700 RPM) for 4 minutes without brake.

steps.title: Check for even plating under microscope
steps.instruction: Check for even plating under microscope.

steps.title: Make sure that the Seahorse XF...
steps.instruction: Make sure that the Seahorse XF Assay medium (Agilent Technologies) is at pH 7.4

steps.title: Prepare drugs and add 25 μL...
steps.instruction: Prepare drugs and add 25 μL into ports for a 96 well seahorse assay or 75 μL into ports for a 24 well seahorse assay

steps.title: Put cell plate in the non-CO...
steps.instruction: Put cell plate in the non-CO 2 incubator while preparing drugs.

steps.title: Option 1
steps.instruction: Option 1 : 500,000 cells/well are added to a 96 well plate.

steps.title: Option 2
steps.instruction: Option 2 : 1 million cells/well are added to a 24 well plate.

steps.title: Add Seahorse Calibrant to a 50 mL conical tube
steps.instruction: Add Seahorse Calibrant to a 50 mL conical tube. Place both the cartridge and aliquoted calibrant at 37°C in a non-CO 2 incubator overnight.
